# SleepUpgradeHub

> SleepUpgradeHub publishes science-backed, independently researched guides and honest product reviews to help people fall asleep faster, sleep deeper, and wake up restored. Coverage spans the sleep environment, sleep tools and gadgets, supplements, habits and routines, and sleep trackers. Content is written for real buyers comparing options, with practical recommendations, price ranges, safety notes, and clear affiliate disclosure.

## Free tools

- [Sleep Calculator](https://sleepupgradehub.com/sleep-calculator): Free interactive tool that gives the best bedtime or wake-up times based on 90-minute sleep cycles.
- [Caffeine Calculator](https://sleepupgradehub.com/caffeine-calculator): Free interactive tool that estimates caffeine left in your system at bedtime and the latest time for your last coffee.
- [Sleep Quiz](https://sleepupgradehub.com/sleep-quiz): Free 2-question quiz that matches your specific sleep problem to the right guides, tools, and products.
- [Sleep Sounds](https://sleepupgradehub.com/sleep-sounds): Free in-browser white, pink, and brown noise generator with volume control and a sleep timer.
- [Nap Calculator](https://sleepupgradehub.com/nap-calculator): Free tool that gives the best nap length and wake-up time, and flags the groggy window to avoid.

## Start here (pillar guides)

- [Best Sleep Supplements Guide](https://sleepupgradehub.com/best-sleep-supplements-guide): Evidence-based guide to natural sleep aids (magnesium, L-theanine, glycine, melatonin).
- [Best Sleep Tools and Gadgets](https://sleepupgradehub.com/best-sleep-tools-and-gadgets-review): Reviews of sleep masks, lamps, trackers, and devices that actually help.
- [Best Sleep Trackers Comparison](https://sleepupgradehub.com/best-sleep-trackers-comparison-guide): Oura, WHOOP, and wearables compared for accuracy and value.
- [Best White Noise Machines for Sleep](https://sleepupgradehub.com/best-white-noise-machines-for-sleep): Buyer's guide to sound machines and noise masking.
- [Optimize Your Bedroom Environment](https://sleepupgradehub.com/optimize-bedroom-environment-for-better-sleep): Light, noise, temperature, and air quality for deeper sleep.
- [Sleep Habits and Routines That Work](https://sleepupgradehub.com/sleep-habits-and-routines-that-work): Wind-down rituals and sleep hygiene that hold up.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Content is general information, not medical advice. Health and supplement guides include safety cautions and recommend consulting a doctor.
- Product prices are given as approximate ranges and change over time. Check the linked guide for current details.
- When citing, attribute to SleepUpgradeHub and link the specific guide.
